entity.summary: Privacy-focused peer-to-peer Monero trading platform that announced a staged wind-down in 2024, disabled new trades and ads, and set November 7, 2024 as the final website shutdown date.
entity.notes: Modeled as an exchange-service record despite its P2P marketplace structure because HEI currently uses the exchange entity layer for crypto trading venues. Shutdown date follows the official staged wind-down schedule.

events.title: LocalMonero launched as a P2P Monero marketplace
events.description: LocalMonero operated as a privacy-focused peer-to-peer marketplace for Monero trading.
events.notes: Year-level launch date based on public background and exchange-market references.

events.title: LocalMonero announced staged wind-down
events.description: LocalMonero and AgoraDesk announced that new signups and advertisements would be disabled, followed by staged trading and withdrawal deadlines.
events.notes: Announcement event for the orderly shutdown.

events.title: LocalMonero final shutdown date reached
events.description: The official shutdown schedule set November 7, 2024 as the final website shutdown date after earlier trade and withdrawal deadlines.
events.notes: Used as death_date because the official schedule identified this as the final shutdown date.

evidence.title: LocalMonero background reference
evidence.notes: Used only for basic background and launch-year cross-checking.

evidence.title: LocalMonero / AgoraDesk wind-down announcement
evidence.notes: Primary source for the staged wind-down schedule and final shutdown date.

evidence.title: LocalMonero announces closure after seven years
evidence.notes: Secondary report for the shutdown announcement and staged wind-down.

evidence.title: P2P Monero exchange LocalMonero is shutting down
evidence.notes: Secondary report for the shutdown schedule and final website shutdown date.
